creator: pete@nomadlogic.org
text:
the diff attached to this ticket will update libX11 to v1.6.7.  i have not had chance to do much testing, but builds fine on 12-STABLE and 11-STABLE jails.  will hopefully have cycles to test tomorrow but wanted to get patch out there so hopefully others can test as well.

upstream commit: https://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/lib/libX11/commit/?id=f3c978476e0be6813268af494efb7ac507451116

release announcement: https://lists.x.org/archives/xorg-announce/2018-October/002921.html
